project_type: Academic thesis (skripsi) in Markdown format - Bab 1-3 revision
test_framework: None - manual review of academic content
verification_instructions: Review the final Skripsi REAL.md to confirm: (1) All BPK/dual governance references removed, (2) Three dependent variables present (Total, PMDN, PMA), (3) Four models in Bab 3, (4) Prior studies table updated with more relevant studies, (5) All citations traceable to journal .md files in the repository
setup_instructions: No setup needed - direct file editing
contribution_requirements: Academic writing in formal Bahasa Indonesia. All statements must be supported by citations from journal files in the repository.
key_patterns: The document uses Markdown with ## headings, tables in Markdown pipe format, equations in italic format with subscripts
